pr.title: Harden Reef chart widgets with lint, check tool, and silent repair
pr.body: ## Summary Reef chart widgets often looked broken even when iframe validation passed. This change hardens templates and validation, adds an agent-side checker, and replaces the technical error panel with a silent repair loop for the latest assistant turn. ## Changes ### Canonical chart pattern - Updated Recharts templates/snippets (`snippet-chart-line`, `snippet-chart-bar`, `slider-graph`, `calculator-with-chart`, `pie-chart`) with `YAxis` `type="number"`, `width={60}`, `toFixed` tick formatter, `margin.left` ≥ 36, and `React.createElement` where specified. ### Static fence lint (`widget-fence-lint.ts`) - Blocks `toExponential`, missing `.rw-chart`/`.mw-chart`, weak YAxis config, and unquoted `var(--*)` in `style={{ }}`. - Wired into `prepareReefWidgetHtml` so bad fences fail before mount. ### Runtime chart probe (`widget-prelude.ts`) - Fails validation when `.recharts-responsive-container` height < 48px or axis ticks use scientific notation. ### `check_reef_widget` tool - Browser tool: static lint + `prepareReefWidgetHtml` + off-DOM iframe probe → JSON `{ ok, errors, warnings }`. - Enabled for `reef-widget` sub-agent; documented in Reef prompts. ### Silent auto-repair (`widget-repair.ts`) - On validation failure (latest assistant bubble, not streaming): keep "Checking widget…", LLM fix-only pass, patch history, re-mount. - Up to 2 attempts; then soft "Preview unavailable" placeholder (no technical error list). ## Tests - `test/chat/reef/widget-fence-lint.test.mts` (new) - Extended `widget-snippets-conventions.test.mjs` - All `test/chat/reef/*` pass via project test loader (67 tests)
pr.author: DukkyGames
